text.title: devops-elk-beats-collection Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for devops-elk-beats-collection. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Every Filebeat log input MUST set fields.service and fields.environment with fields_under_root: true so that these fields appear at the document root in Elasticsearch. Inputs for application logs MUST enable JSON parsing (json.keys_under_root: true) when the application emits structured JSON.
rule.rationale: Fields not at document root end up nested under a fields object, making KQL queries require fields.service syntax instead of service, which breaks dashboards and alerting rules that expect flat field names.
